This is the beginning of testcase advanced. Please output a copy of the log into advanced.log.
Load design from top.v in directory testdata/design/
What is the fanout of net n2?
Insert buffer stages on high-fanout net n2 so that no gate has fanout greater than 2.
Remove any dangling gates and nets that do not affect any primary output.
Replace all inverters followed by buffers with a single inverter, if this does not change functionality.
Optimize the logic cone of out0 so that the maximum depth is less than or equal to 2.
Write out the design to testdata/advanced_out.v
